headline: Why Is ADP (ADP) Up 3.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: ADP (ADP) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on F5, Maintains $425 Price Target

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on F5, Raises Price Target to $423
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst James Fish   maintains F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $356 to $423.

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Question
summary: Mid-cap stocks often strike the right balance between having proven business models and market opportunities that can support $100 billion corporations. However, they face intense competition from scaled industry giants and can be disrupted by new innovative players vying for a slice of the pie.
